improvements: Clippy now notices the moment background sync stops — even while you're looking at the app — and brings it back on its own
A big backlog of clips now syncs in batches, so a long offline stretch can't overwhelm the app
fixes: Images no longer reappear as new clips "copied" on a device that never copied them
Fixed a long copy sometimes syncing cut off halfway
Screenshots and copies are no longer lost when captured just as another clip arrives
Clips are no longer lost when the connection drops mid-sync
Clips no longer sync twice when two syncs start at the same moment
A screenshot that failed to read once is retried instead of skipped for good
